name: SAM HELSON NUNES DINIZ
title: Computer Engineer · Software Developer · Data Analyst
summary:
26 years old, Computer Engineer, Software Developer, and Data Analyst specialized in Java Back-End, focused on building scalable REST APIs and microservices architectures. I have been working professionally for 3 years, developing and maintaining public, private, and freelance management systems that produce, organize, and consume large volumes of data. My core technologies include Java, Spring Boot, Git/GitLab, Oracle, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, RabbitMQ, WebSocket, Docker, and SonarQube.

I have intermediate knowledge of Excel, basic skills in building dashboards, Power BI, SQL, Power Query, and data design, along with familiarity with corporate tools.

I also have complementary knowledge in Scrum, Linux, Networking basics, HTML/CSS/JS, QA support, UX/UI basics, and technical English at a B1 level. Available to work on-site in other Brazilian states, also in another country, with flexibility for travel and relocation, and also open to remote opportunities.

items: QA / Test scenario design and execution

bullets: Developed a complete hotel management SaaS using Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, HTML, CSS, and JS, covering registrations, bookings, stays, check-in/check-out. Modeled dashboards and operational indicators for billing, inventory control, and the financial module with reports by period.
Implemented inventory control with inbound and outbound movements linked to consumption entries, ensuring data integrity and consistency.
Developed an AI agent integrated with LLM APIs that collects, organizes, and persists service data in a database for later analysis and traceability.
Designed interfaces and dashboards in Figma and converted the prototypes into functional screens with HTML/CSS/JS, handling the visual presentation of data.
Acted in QA by designing and executing test scenarios to validate business rules and detect data inconsistencies across modules.
Deployed to a VM on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, independently managing scope, deadlines, and process documentation.

experience.company: SEAP - State Secretariat of Penitentiary Administration of Maranhao (Sao Luis, Maranhao, Brazil)
bullets: Designed and developed an asynchronous API to orchestrate entries and exits of inmates across all prison units in the state of Maranhao, integrating Intelbras facial biometric devices via REST with real-time validation, supporting operational monitoring activities for sentence-reduction assurance.
Used RabbitMQ as a message broker, supporting a high volume of simultaneous events and real-time updates for operational dashboards and monitoring systems via WebSocket.

Migrated legacy monolithic systems to a REST API microservices architecture with Spring Boot: HR (screening, registration, and delegation of public servant access), Warehouse, Help-Desk, Dentistry, Clinical Care, Educational Care, and Queue Caller, automating several critical manual processes of the prison system.
Experience in maintenance, applying continuous improvements in a production environment.
Persisted detailed access, movement, and audit logs, ensuring full traceability of events.
Automated PDF report generation with JasperReports, eliminating recurring manual processes from operations.
Raised security, maintainability, and code standardization with continuous static analysis via SonarQube and coverage consistently above 98% in unit tests with JUnit 5.
Acted as QA on specific demands, designing and executing test scenarios to validate business rules and data consistency across microservices, optimizing time to meet final project delivery deadlines.
Standardized API documentation with Swagger/OpenAPI in alignment with the front-end and QA teams.
Used Git (GitLab), Docker, and CI/CD pipelines in an agile environment with Scrum.

experience.company: SEAP - State Secretariat of Penitentiary Administration of Maranhao (Sao Luis, Maranhao, Brazil)
bullets: Performed code maintenance and optimization, identifying and fixing inconsistencies in existing systems and data.
Designed and executed quality tests to validate deliveries, with coverage above 90%, developing hands-on practice in data validation and consistency.

experience.company: SEAP - State Secretariat of Penitentiary Administration of Maranhao (Sao Luis, Maranhao, Brazil)
bullets: Developed spreadsheet automations (Excel) for ticket logging and control, standardizing data and reducing time spent on recurring operational tasks.
Prioritized and resolved incident tickets with in-person, phone, and remote support, keeping records organized and documented.
Provided hardware/software support and managed internal tools, ensuring the performance of IT resources.

experience.company: Ruy Palhano Psychiatry Institute (Sao Luis, Maranhao, Brazil)
bullets: Supported administrative routines and IT support, organizing records and developing customer service and problem-solving skills.
Managed operations, bookings, inventory, finance, and pricing, tracking indicators and developing business and commercial insight.
